reasoning: Addressing your lactate clearance limiter directly by focusing on over-under intervals, which will help improve your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. Your last ride was a lower intensity effort allowing us to push harder today. These gains translate perfectly to holding 220-235W on the essential Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6 sets of 3 minutes at 242-256W followed by 3 minutes at 201-218W. Repeat without rest.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
